message:
🐛 Suppress implement-fix failure issues — redundant with direct Copilot assignment

The implement-fix gh-aw workflow fires on every triage/accepted label
but Copilot is now assigned directly via the API. The workflow fails
(can't do anything useful) and creates noise [aw] failure issues.

Added report-failure-as-issue: false to stop the noise.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@
 # For more information: https://github.github.com/gh-aw/introduction/overview/
 #
 #
-# gh-aw-metadata: {"schema_version":"v2","frontmatter_hash":"163d34c327840af8150a11a7a30ad5566f82168b144a961f92b643083bf511e9","compiler_version":"v0.58.3","strict":true}
+# gh-aw-metadata: {"schema_version":"v2","frontmatter_hash":"a7ceda626ca0c193621d8762bca9a74e4b7f2ffb1259136e06d0aeb468342931","compiler_version":"v0.58.3","strict":true}
 
 name: "⚠️ MANDATORY: BUILD AND LINT BEFORE EVERY COMMIT ⚠️"
 "on":
@@ -1130,7 +1130,7 @@ jobs:
           GH_AW_ASSIGNMENT_ERRORS: ${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.assign_to_agent_assignment_errors }}
           GH_AW_ASSIGNMENT_ERROR_COUNT: ${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.assign_to_agent_assignment_error_count }}
           GH_AW_GROUP_REPORTS: "false"
-          GH_AW_FAILURE_REPORT_AS_ISSUE: "true"
+          GH_AW_FAILURE_REPORT_AS_ISSUE: "false"
           GH_AW_TIMEOUT_MINUTES: "20"
         with:
           github-token: ${{ secrets.GH_AW_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@ on:
         required: true
 
 safe-outputs:
+  report-failure-as-issue: false
   assign-to-agent:
   add-comment:
     max: 2
